name: What if Google AI Overview harms my reputation in Los Angeles - is there a CA lawsuit?
description: Section 230 blocks most claims; check CA-specific torts with local attorney.

mainEntity.name: What if Google AI Overview harms my reputation in Los Angeles - is there a CA lawsuit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Section 230 blocks most claims; check CA-specific torts with local attorney.
acceptedAnswer.description: Limited options; Section 230 likely shields Google, but CA right of publicity or false light claims might apply narrowly.[2] No AI Overview-specific CA precedent yet. Key factors: Public figure status; falsity and harm proof; immunity challenges. Screenshot errors, notify Google, explore insurance for reputation damage. Seek LA business litigation counsel.
